what_was_done: Executed all 5 ETAP 0 steps successfully: (1) system_bootstrap — loaded mandatory MCP guidance, bootstrap v2026-03-23, confirmed 10 mandatory rules and research rules. (2) system_health with validate_tools=true — confirmed all 46 tools registered, server healthy, all 10 domains healthy (datasets, features, models, backtests_runs, backtests_snapshots, backtests_research, experiments, research_memory, telegram, system), queue depth 0, no anomalies. (3) gold_collection(action='add') — added cf_vol_term_spread as feature entity with reason documenting v1 winner metrics: +14.3% PnL ($1496.34 vs $1308.65 baseline), Sharpe 1.456, 330 trades, PF 1.571, max DD ~1.68%. (4) research_record(action='create', kind='result') — recorded Plan v1 Final Verdicts to research memory (node-ea2b98556a214bca88c765c50e068543) with metrics: net_pnl=1496.34, sharpe=1.456, profit_factor=1.571, max_drawdown=0.0168, trade_count=330. Verdicts: PROMOTE cf_vol_term_spread, REJECT cf_funding_extreme and cf_return_skew. (5) features_catalog(scope='available') — confirmed 24 available features including 3 custom features (cf_vol_term_spread, cf_funding_extreme, cf_return_skew), 4 classifier columns (cl_15m, cl_1d, cl_1h, cl_4h), and various builtin features (atr_1, rsi, iv_est, event markers, time features).
